{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164433FDE6DC2E384BC101CE8C"}"},"total":137},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617808030089167641","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个题材可以啊，长生者游戏人间，没乱七八糟的修仙高武，就单纯是作为一个看客和玩家在一个又一个朝代留下属于自己的故事，有点唯我独仙的味道了。","text_exts":[{"e":64,"s":60,"text":"唯我独仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%94%AF%E6%88%91%E7%8B%AC%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773996273C101CE8C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617808030089167641%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227610340451278654488%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%94%AF%E6%88%91%E7%8B%AC%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773660100,"group_id":"7610340451278654488","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N52dI33ucrPAm5aUpwV4F7c=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"421820730704071","user_name":"用户名29943848"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"421820730704071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610340451278654488","book_info":{"abstract":"【历史+苟道+穿越+轻松+长生+乐子+官场】
（新书刚开分，会涨上去，大家不要被吓走呀！）
顾长安穿越大景王朝，觉醒长生不老体质。
为了不被切片，他化身六品起居郎，开启了极致的“苟”道人生。
夺嫡之争？造反逼宫？
这些都不关我的事，我只是个拿笔记录历史的吃瓜群众。
把政敌熬死，我是元老；
把皇帝熬死，我是两朝元老；
把王朝熬死，我就是历史的见证者！
直到一甲子后，三朝元老顾长安假死脱身，换了个马甲重返新朝。
这次我不当起居舍人，我选择当御史。
满朝文武看着这个战斗力爆表的大喷子瑟瑟发抖。
这老油条到底是从哪冒出来的？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5f9f2d1d64140730919564a225be0ea9","author":"鹈鹕镇村民","author_id":"","book_id":"7610340451278654488","book_name":"历史赋我长生，我终苟成万朝元老","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b078","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610340700336423448","read_count":"174078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"188475"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"85","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,架空,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e5bc2632db19581531a74b1713a13f6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180273&x-signature=oUcEg2pRW4%2BLa7Ab7iKCf371oSs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2921857751984368","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164433FDE6DC2E384BC101CE8C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1715,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10058,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":68},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773711574,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616564105642378046","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才叫长生者，那些修仙长生修的不是无情，就是狂傲，要不就是无敌无趣，漫长人生把七情六欲全抛弃了，活成一种执念，可悲可笑。
这本书的长生才是正常人该有的样子，即可以潇洒人间，体验市井百态；又可以参与庙堂，怒斥诸衮衮诸公。不入世局，不受大义裹挟，游戏人间，真乃仙人也","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":3,"text":"长生者","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%95%BF%E7%94%9F%E8%80%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773996273C101CE8C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616564105642378046%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227610340451278654488%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%95%BF%E7%94%9F%E8%80%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773372827,"group_id":"7610340451278654488","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwmTmy4cM4T+NmKn/dKLc/U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c3bd2be4ee754455a6b09e5b0854aea2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533797&x-signature=5aSPTQukoOZBf8lNmbS5MBDJ09Q%3D","user_id":"294286255989981","user_name":"战锤布布汪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"294286255989981","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":191,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1729968358,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610340451278654488","book_info":{"abstract":"【历史+苟道+穿越+轻松+长生+乐子+官场】
